subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar declined Zenvon's offer to join the party, citing his injuries and other missions.
source_quote: Sildar declined, citing injuries and other missions

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar stressed the importance of capturing or eliminating Klarg before he could send word ahead.
source_quote: stressed the importance of capturing or eliminating Klarg before he could send word ahead

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar offered to wait at the camp and pay 50 gold pieces for an escort to Neverwinter or Phandalin.
source_quote: Agreed to wait at the camp and offered to pay 50 gold pieces for an escort to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon attempted to persuade Sildar to join the party.
source_quote: Attempted to persuade Sildar to join the party

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon attempted to distract wolves by throwing food.
source_quote: Attempted to distract wolves by throwing food

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon used deception to imitate a goblin voice, luring one goblin closer for a surprise attack.
source_quote: Used deception (rolled 15) to imitate a goblin voice, luring one goblin closer for a surprise attack

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin, allowing the kill to go unnoticed.
source_quote: Rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin, allowing the kill to go unnoticed

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra before she was swept away.
source_quote: Rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra before she was swept away

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile to deal 15 points of damage on Klarg.
source_quote: Used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt before it could escape and alert others.
source_quote: killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt (7 points of damage) before it could escape and alert others

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves rather than killing them.
source_quote: successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves rather than killing them

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head who was present during the ambush on the Triboar Trail.
source_quote: Mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head who was present during the ambush on the Triboar Trail

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar was unable to interpret the phrase 'You're not what Ruxithid wants' whispered by the goblin.
source_quote: a phrase neither Sildar nor the party could interpret

subject: The Elongated Goblin
fact: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin remains an unresolved mystery.
source_quote: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin and the phrase 'You're not what Ruxithid wants' remain unexplained

subject: Gundren
fact: The party still does not know where Gundren was taken after the ambush.
source_quote: The party still does not know where Gundren was taken after the ambush

subject: The Black Spider
fact: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown.
source_quote: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon was repeatedly brought close to 0 HP due to wolf attacks and the absence of consistent healing.
source_quote: Zenvon was repeatedly brought close to 0 HP due to wolf attacks and the absence of consistent healing
